title: Xtra Velvety Venezuelan Noodles
description: A funky and velvety Venezuelan dish featuring noodles, cooked to perfection in a bain-marie and served in a scallop shell, perfect for a midnight craving. This plant-based friendly recipe is a must try for noodle lovers.
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil and cook the rice noodles according to the package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat and saute the diced onion until translucent.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for an additional minute.
Add the sliced mushrooms to the skillet and cook until they release their moisture and start to brown.
In a small bowl, mix together the plant-based cheese, cumin, and paprika.
In a bain-marie, combine the cooked noodles, mushroom mixture, and cheese mixture, stirring until the cheese is melted and the noodles are well coated.
Season the noodles with salt and pepper to taste.
Spoon the noodles into scallop shells and serve immediately.
